# Mina Samy Tawfik Saad

Canonical profile: https://minasami.github.io/
Location: Cairo and 6th of October City, Egypt
Primary roles: Project Management, PMO, Digital Health, Healthcare Operations, Digital Transformation
Professional identity: Licensed Pharmacist and project management professional

## Summary
Mina Samy Tawfik Saad is a project management and PMO professional with experience coordinating healthcare, pharmaceutical, operational and technical initiatives. His work includes project planning, stakeholder management, governance documentation, process mapping, risk identification, KPI reporting, workflow automation, implementation support and change management.

## Core capabilities
- Project planning and execution
- PMO governance and project controls
- Stakeholder and cross-functional coordination
- Risk and issue management
- Executive reporting and KPI dashboards
- Healthcare and pharmaceutical operations
- Digital health workflow design
- Process improvement and automation
- Technical requirements and cloud delivery
- Change management and user adoption

## Evidence-backed projects
### Medicine Support Hub
Live URL: https://medicine-support-hub--minasamitawfik.replit.app/
A bilingual clinical-commercial pharmacy workflow platform integrating more than 86,000 Egyptian medicines and supporting eight operational roles across request intake, clinical review, pharmacy preparation, branch operations, delivery and administration.

### Employee Support Program Transformation
Digitized manual employee healthcare support workflows using structured process stages, ownership, escalation, automated routing, service tracking, SOPs, dashboards and training.

### Chronic Medication Support
Coordinated reviewers, physicians, pharmacists, administrators and fulfillment teams to improve medication continuity, visibility and escalation.

### Learning Platform Deployments
Supported OpenEdx and Moodle deployments across cloud environments, including implementation coordination, documentation and administration.

## Career timeline
- Senior Coordinator — Digital Transformation & Operational Excellence, EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation, 2025–present
- Healthcare Projects & Process Digitalisation Coordinator, EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation, 2023–2025
- Operations Programme Coordinator, Masr Bila Marad NGO, 2022–2023
- Freelance Digital Systems & Cloud Solutions, 2014–2023

## Education and credentials
- Bachelor of Pharmacy, Ain Shams University, 2021
- Licensed Pharmacist, Egyptian Ministry of Health
- Certified Specialty Pharmacist (CSP)
- PMP candidate, in progress
- Johns Hopkins Health Informatics Specialization, in progress
